metadata.title: CRQ Prompt Generator
metadata.description: Generate high-quality, structured AI prompts using the CRQ (Context-Refinement-Quality) Framework

header.title: Text Prompt Generator
header.subtitle: CRQ (Context-Refinement-Quality) Framework
header.tagline: Fill in the form below to generate your tailored prompt

intro.title: What is This Tool?
intro.paragraph1: This Text Prompt Generator is a free tool designed to help you create clear, detailed, and effective instructions for Large Language Models (LLMs) like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude.
intro.paragraph2: By structuring your request using our CRQ (Context-Refinement-Quality) Framework, you can significantly improve the accuracy and relevance of the AI's response, saving you time and effort.
intro.paragraph3: A great prompt is the key to unlocking the full potential of AI. This generator guides you through the process of providing the necessary context and constraints, turning a simple idea into a powerful, machine-readable instruction.

role.label: Desired Role or Perspective
role.placeholder: Select or enter a role or perspective
role.tooltip: Specify the role, perspective, or expertise required for the task. For example, 'Content Writer,' 'SEO Specialist,' or 'Marketing Expert.'
role.helper: e.g., Define the required skill you need for the task, 'Act as a marketing strategist to draft a social media campaign.'

background.label: Background Information
background.tooltip: Provide context by describing your company, industry, and any relevant information for the task. Include key details such as company size, market position, goals, and any unique challenges.
background.helper: e.g., Describe your background or your company's context, your industry, and any valuable information to align with the task.

task.label: Content Creation Task
task.tooltip: Define the specific content creation task you want to be performed. Be as detailed as possible.
task.helper: e.g., Write a blog post about [Subject], create a product description, or design an infographic.

geoBoost.label: GEO Optimization
geoBoost.description: Your prompts are automatically optimized for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). This helps AI create content that performs better in AI-powered search engines and recommendation systems by incorporating structured data, clear hierarchies, and semantic richness.
geoBoost.tooltip: Enable this to add specific instructions to your prompt, guiding the AI to create content optimized for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO).

audience.label: Audience Profile
audience.placeholder: Select or enter an audience profile
audience.helper: e.g., Tech-savvy individuals interested in AI

audienceGeo.label: Audience Geographical Context
audienceGeo.helper: e.g., North American market, European Union

contentFormats.label: Content Formats
contentFormats.helper: e.g., Blog Posts, Newsletters, Social Media Posts

writingFramework.label: Writing Framework
writingFramework.helper: Choose a framework to structure your content

reasoningFramework.label: Reasoning Framework
reasoningFramework.helper: Choose a framework to guide AI reasoning

variations.label: Content Variations & Limits
variations.helper: e.g., Limit to 800 words, Create 3 variations

examples.label: Examples to Follow
examples.helper: Provide examples or references for the AI to follow

validation.required: Please fill in the following mandatory field(s): {fields}

stats.title: Prompt Statistics
stats.note1: "Estimated Prompt Tokens" indicates the number of tokens for this generated prompt. This estimate is for prompt input and may impact usage costs in some AI models.
stats.note2: Tokens are the basic units of text processing for AI models. This token count is an estimate based on a simplified tokenization method.

usage.title: How to Use the Prompt

step1.title: Copy the Prompt
step1.description: Click "Copy to Clipboard" to copy the generated prompt text.

step2.title: Paste into Your AI Tool
step2.description: Paste the content into your preferred LLM or AI agent's user interface.

step3.title: Engage with the AI
step3.description: Follow the agent's instructions as it guides you through the content creation process. To skip any steps, simply type "Just proceed."

step4.title: Finalize and Test
step4.description: After generating the initial content, ask the agent to "Test it" to simulate different audience perceptions and get feedback.

usage.note: This prompt is designed for interactive human-AI collaboration and may not be ideal for direct system execution.

techniques.title: Overall Techniques Used
techniques.intro: The prompt generator employs a structured, collaborative, and reflective approach for content creation:

framework.title: Framework-Based Reasoning & Writing
framework.description: Select a specific reasoning or writing framework, or let the AI determine the most suitable one.

audience.title: Audience and Persona-Centric Content Development
audience.description: Tailor content to resonate deeply with targeted audience segments.

directives.title: Clear Directives and Guidelines
directives.description: Comprehensive instructions to avoid common pitfalls and maintain high content quality.

language.title: Dynamic Language Injection
language.description: Custom dictionary to ensure natural, fresh, and engaging output.

q1.question: What is the CRQ (Context-Refinement-Quality) Framework?
q1.answer: The CRQ Framework is a systematic approach to prompt engineering. It stands for Context, Refinement, and Quality. It ensures that every prompt you create provides the AI with sufficient background information (Context), detailed instructions on tone, style, and format (Refinement), and clear examples or constraints to ensure a high-quality output (Quality).

q2.question: How do I use this prompt generator?
q2.answer: 1. Fill in the 'Context Variables' section with the role, background, and task. 2. Optionally, add 'Refinement Variables' like tone, audience, and format. 3. Click 'Generate' to create your prompt. 4. Copy and use it with your preferred AI tool.

q3.question: Who can benefit from using a structured prompt generator?
q3.answer: Anyone who interacts with Large Language Models (LLMs) can benefit. This includes digital marketers, content creators, developers, students, researchers, and business professionals.

aiPick.name: Let the AI pick a Writing Framework for you
aiPick.description: Choose this option to let the AI recommend the most suitable writing approach based on your specific task.

threeAct.name: 3-Act Structure
threeAct.description: A storytelling technique with three acts: setup, confrontation, and resolution.

fiveWs.name: 5W's (Who, What, When, Where, Why)
fiveWs.description: Ensures content answers the fundamental questions about a topic.

aida.name: AIDA (Attention, Interest, Desire, Action)
aida.description: Focuses on the stages a consumer goes through when making a purchase decision.

fab.name: FAB (Features, Advantages, Benefits)
fab.description: Highlights product or service features, their advantages, and benefits.

gps.name: GPS (Goal, Promise, Support)
gps.description: Structures content by defining a goal, making a promise, and providing support.

pas.name: PAS (Problem, Agitation, Solution)
pas.description: Identifies a problem, agitates it, and presents a solution.

slap.name: SLAP (Stop, Look, Act, Purchase)
slap.description: Creates content that stops the audience, makes them look, prompts action, and leads to purchase.

stori.name: STORI (Storytelling)
stori.description: Leverages storytelling techniques to engage and connect emotionally.

aiPick.name: Let the AI pick a Reasoning Framework for you
aiPick.description: Let the AI recommend the most suitable reasoning approach based on your specific task.

chainOfThought.name: Chain-of-Thought (CoT)
chainOfThought.description: Use when tackling complex problems that can be broken down into sequential steps.

iterative.name: Iterative Refinement
iterative.description: Best for projects that require multiple revisions to refine and perfect the output.

qStar.name: Q-star Reasoning
qStar.description: Ideal for structuring content around key questions to enhance clarity and purpose.

reflective.name: Reflective Reasoning
reflective.description: Employ for critical analyses and continuous improvement throughout the process.

summarization.name: Summarization and Distillation
summarization.description: Useful when you need to condense large amounts of information into key takeaways.

prompt.askClarification: Feel free to ask for clarification.
prompt.suggestAnswers: Suggest potential answers for each query based on my context.
prompt.reviewOutput: I will review the initial output.
prompt.openToIterations: Be open to iterations for refining the content.
prompt.simulatePersonas: Simulate how three personas perceive the content.
prompt.geoConsideration: Use the audience's geographical input to evaluate cultural tone adjustments, laws to highlight, or any other elements you need to consider.
prompt.factualResponses: Ensure that the responses are grounded in verifiable facts and refrain from generating speculative or fictional content, prioritizing accuracy and reliability in the output
prompt.qualityStandards: Focus on upholding the high-quality standards detailed above, respecting the token limit. Indicate the commencement of each phase for smooth collaboration. Bold any changes you suggest in the text.
prompt.geoBoostStats: Include specific statistics and data points from authoritative sources
prompt.geoBoostCite: Cite credible references and studies where applicable
prompt.geoBoostLanguage: Use clear, direct language that AI systems can easily parse
prompt.geoBoostStructure: Structure content with clear headings and logical flow
prompt.geoBoostCoverage: Provide comprehensive coverage of the topic
prompt.geoBoostQuotable: Use quotable statements that can be easily extracted
prompt.bannedWordsAvoid: Avoid the following common phrases and words
prompt.bannedWordsExclude: Completely Exclude these specific overused terms
prompt.bannedWordsRemove: Remove these phrases that often appear cliched or generic
